problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix may resolve What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
